summary: Hunt initiated on seed IP 45.142.212.31 (Aeza Group, AS210644, Moscow). IP presents a self-signed certificate (CN=invalid2.invalid) with Google HTTP redirect overlay on port 443 — classic SNI evasion / traffic camouflage technique. Pivot via VirusTotal passive DNS on vpnplus.ru (most recent domain, 2025-02-06) revealed a 10-IP rotation cluster spanning Aeza Group (Moldova/Russia), Timeweb (CZ/KZ), Hetzner (FI), and OVH (NL/FR). Three IPs flagged malicious by commercial threat feeds. Operator infrastructure identified: vpnplus.ru management panel subdomains (panel, bot, tgbot, de01, subs) and mantpartners.com (co-hosted on OVH FR 135.125.181.208). Registrar fingerprint: REGRU-RU / ns1.reg.ru + ns2.reg.ru. Cross-cluster shared domain indicator: onypy.com appeared on two cluster IPs. Possible Telegram C2 channel via tgbot.vpnplus.ru and bot.vpnplus.ru. No known public threat feed attribution at time of hunt (OTX: 0 pulses on all cluster domains).

sigma_rules:
title: vpnplus.ru Operator Cluster C2 Detection
id: 4f9b2a1c-8e3d-4f7b-a123-c2d5e6f7a8b9
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects network connections to the vpnplus.ru adversary infrastructure cluster discovered
    via seed IP 45.142.212.31 (Aeza Group AS210644). Cluster spans Aeza, Timeweb, OVH hosting.
    Operator uses Telegram bot C2 channel and SNI-evasion (invalid2.invalid self-signed cert).
references:
  - https://github.com/infosecbhanu/adversary-intel
author: infosecbhanu
date: 2026-06-14
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.t1090.001
  - attack.t1568
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_ips:
    DestinationIp|cidr:
      - 45.142.212.31/32
      - 194.87.27.217/32
      - 77.73.132.40/32
      - 194.67.71.147/32
      - 109.71.246.116/32
  selection_domains:
    dns.query.name|contains:
      - vpnplus.ru
      - mantpartners.com
      - rocshers.cloud
      - rocshers.me
      - onypy.com
      - pharaonvpn.duckdns.org
  selection_cert_cn:
    tls.server.x509.subject.common_name: 'invalid2.invalid'
  condition: selection_ips or selection_domains or selection_cert_cn
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate VPN service traffic (vpnplus.ru brand)
level: high
nuclei_templates:
id: vpnplus-cluster-c2-multi
info:
  name: vpnplus.ru Operator Cluster C2 Detection
  author: infosecbhanu
  severity: high
  description: |
    Multi-signal detection for the vpnplus.ru adversary cluster.
    Checks TLS cert CN=invalid2.invalid (self-signed) and HTTP redirect overlay pattern.
  tags:
    - c2
    - vpn
    - threat-hunting
    - aeza-group
  metadata:
    shodan-query: ssl.cert.subject.cn:invalid2.invalid
    jarm: 29d3fd00029d29d21c42d43d00041df61f6b5fa6973e9fa14c8155669c6633

http:
  - method: GET
    path:
      - {{BaseURL}}/
    matchers-condition: or
    matchers:
      - type: word
        part: header
        words:
          - invalid2.invalid
        name: self-signed-cert-cn

ssl:
  - address: {{Host}}:{{Port}}
    matchers:
      - type: word
        part: subject
        words:
          - invalid2.invalid
        name: invalid-cert-sni-evasion

jarm.note: Seed JARM is all-null (TLS not responding on probe port); VT reports full JARM from historical scan

http_anomaly.description: Port 443 returns Google-style HTTP 301 redirect over plain HTTP; TLS layer presents self-signed invalid cert. SNI routing / traffic camouflage.

cluster_ips.cert_anomaly: yahoo.com cert (DigiCert) — CDN-fronted or cert spoofing

cluster_ips.jarm_note: Matches Sliver C2 prefix — likely coincidental (REG.RU shared hosting with 20+ domains)

cluster_ips.note: Cluster IP; hosted onypy.com, pharaonvpn.duckdns.org, okypn.ru, sh0tx.ru
Former onypy.com host; also hosted secret.onypy.com subdomain

vpnplus.ru.span: Moldova, Russia, Netherlands, Finland, Kazakhstan, Czech Republic, France

detection_opportunities: TLS cert CN=invalid2.invalid on port 443 with HTTPS traffic
JARM 29d3fd00029d29d21c42d43d00041df61f6b5fa6973e9fa14c8155669c6633 — unique fingerprint for Shodan pivot
HTTP redirect overlay on TLS port (SNI evasion) — detect mismatch between HTTP Host and TLS SNI
vpnplus.ru / mantpartners.com DNS lookups from corporate networks
Telegram bot C2 pattern: tgbot.vpnplus.ru, bot.vpnplus.ru subdomains
